case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO VS. GLORIA VANDERHORST ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANDERHORST, GLORIA VANDERHORST, LEO C. $5,839.21 PRINCIPAL, $423.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,263.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15350023)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VANDERHORST, GLORIA VANDERHORST, LEO C. DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-11-2016
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15350023) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION REGARDING CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 15350023) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK
DECLARATION REGARDING VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 15350023) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 16245006) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT VANDERHORST, GLORIA VANDERHORST, LEO C.
